title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Zomato Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Zomato Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Faridabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zomato Holdings Services:
Zomato Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Holdings Services!
